image.prompt: A monochromatic workspace surface photographed from above, showing the ghost outline of a disassembled workflow—scattered index cards, half-erased process diagrams on graph paper, a single mechanical pencil mid-stroke. The composition suggests arrested documentation: someone started mapping how work actually happens, then stopped. Deep charcoal background fades to near-black at edges. One card catches dim side-light, revealing handwritten annotations that trail off incomplete. Negative space dominates the frame. The image reads as forensic evidence of the gap between intention and execution, shot in flat editorial style with no gradient or shine.
